artifact.title: Pixel Grid Editor
artifact.description: An interactive pixel-art grid editor: paint, erase, flood-fill, and eyedrop on an 8x8 / 16x16 / 32x32 canvas, with undo/redo, gridline toggle, live 1:1 preview, and PNG export. Quiet systems-grade chrome, single accent, both themes.
artifact.scope: Interactive pixel-art grid editor (Level 2). Paint / Erase / Fill / Eyedropper tools, 8x8 / 16x16 / 32x32 grid sizes, curated 16-swatch palette, undo/redo history, clear, gridline toggle, live 1:1 preview, Copy/Download PNG. Keyboard-first (P/E/G/I, Ctrl/Cmd+Z, Ctrl/Cmd+Shift+Z). Tech/utility direction, restrained chrome, both themes, strict inline CSP.
